final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial photo of a retro American road trip scene on Route 66.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography, retro Americana aesthetic, Kodachrome-inspired color grading, vintage travel magazine editorial
Composition: wide-angle establishing shot from a low angle, 28mm lens, car positioned left of frame moving toward horizon, vast desert landscape stretching to infinity
Subject: classic red convertible with chrome details, top down, driver silhouette visible, dust trail behind
Scene/backdrop: Route 66 highway cutting through arid desert, saguaro cacti dotting both sides of the road, distant mesas on horizon
Lighting/mood: golden hour sunset, warm orange-red sky gradient, long dramatic shadows, nostalgic and liberating atmosphere
Color palette: burnt orange and crimson sky as dominant, vintage red convertible as anchor, sandy beige desert, deep green cactus accents
Materials/textures: film grain texture, weathered asphalt, oxidized metal details, wispy cirrus clouds
Avoid: modern cars, clean digital look, oversaturated HDR, plastic textures, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
